narrative:
Lafayette (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,180 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
